summary: Iteration 54: SPET POS UI/UX refinement testing complete. All 19 requested features tested successfully. Fixed 1 bug: ServerAssign button in TABLE page changed from red/pulse to neutral gray. Login redirects to Lovable work correctly, authenticated routes accessible, TAP/TABLE/Kitchen pages working with all UI features verified.

issues: Minor: Hydration warning about nested buttons in tab card (button inside button for status chevron) - doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Unauthenticated redirect to Lovable login works correctly (window.location.href = LOVABLE_LOGIN)
ProtectedRoute redirects to REACT_APP_LOVABLE_LOGIN_URL when not authenticated
TAP: Tab cards show green status dot (normal), yellow (warning), red (issue) - manual status control works
TAP: Bartender selector is neutral gray (bg-muted text-muted-foreground), not red
TAP: Category headers have full-color backgrounds (amber for Beers, pink for Cocktails, etc.)
TAP: Age verification modal appears for alcohol items with ShieldCheck icon and 'Confirm 21+' button
TABLE: Free tables have green background (emerald-500), busy tables have dark gray background (foreground/[0.08])
TABLE: Server selector is neutral gray, not red
TABLE: Add table form validates empty, duplicate, and non-numeric inputs correctly
TABLE: ID verification modal has z-index: 9999 (proper stacking)
TABLE: Empty category shows '+ Add Item' button
Kitchen: Page loads with 5 kanban columns (Pending, Preparing, Ready, Delivered, Delayed) with proper spacing
Venue: Modules dropdown appears correctly on top of other elements

success_rate.backend: 100% - Health check, auth/login, staff/barmen, tap/sessions, tap/catalog APIs working
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 19 UI features verified and working

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI/UX refinement features verified in iteration 54. Login page REMOVED from frontend - to test authenticated pages, set localStorage 'spetap_token' and 'active_venue_id' using page.add_init_script() before navigation. Fixed ServerAssign button styling (was red/pulse, now neutral gray). TAP page: green status dots, status dropdown (Normal/Warning/Issue), bartender selector neutral gray, age verify modal. TABLE page: green=free, dark gray=busy, server selector neutral gray, add table validation, ID verify z-index=9999. Kitchen: 5 kanban columns with proper spacing. Modules dropdown appears on top.

tap_page.bartender_selector_neutral_gray: ✅ PASS - Not red/pulse, uses bg-muted text-muted-foreground
tap_page.category_header_full_color: ✅ PASS - Amber for Beers, pink for Cocktails
tap_page.age_verify_modal: ✅ PASS - data-testid='age-verify-modal' appears for alcohol items
tap_page.age_verify_confirm: ✅ PASS - data-testid='age-verify-confirm' button with ShieldCheck icon

table_page.free_tables_green: ✅ PASS - emerald-500/10 background for free tables
table_page.busy_tables_dark_gray: ✅ PASS - foreground/[0.08] background for busy tables
table_page.server_assign_neutral_gray: ✅ PASS (FIXED) - Changed from red/pulse to bg-muted text-muted-foreground
table_page.add_table_validation_empty: ✅ PASS - Add button disabled when empty
table_page.add_table_validation_non_numeric: ✅ PASS - Shows 'Table number must be numeric' error

kitchen_page.loads_with_proper_spacing: ✅ PASS - 5 kanban columns with proper spacing between cards

venue_home.modules_dropdown_zindex: ✅ PASS - Dropdown appears on top of other elements

bug_fixed.issue: Unassigned server button used red color with pulse animation
bug_fixed.fix: Changed styling from 'bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/20 animate-pulse' to 'bg-muted text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted/80'
